itemDetail.notFoundDescription: This item may have been removed or is not available.

condition.title: Condition ratings
condition.body: Choose the rating that best describes your item's current state.
condition.good: New — unused, in original packaging. Like New — opened but no visible wear. Good — fully functional, minor cosmetic wear. Fair — works but has noticeable wear or damage. Poor — needs repair or has significant damage.

tags.title: Choosing good tags
tags.body: Tags help buyers discover your item through search. Use specific, descriptive words that a buyer might search for.

acceptOffers.title: How offers work
acceptOffers.body: When enabled, buyers can submit price offers on your item. Each new offer must be higher than the previous one. You can also set a minimum offer price to filter out lowball offers automatically.

endDate.title: Timed listings
endDate.body: Setting an end date creates a timed auction. When the deadline passes, the highest offer wins. Anti-snipe protection: if an offer arrives in the last 10 minutes, the deadline extends by 10 minutes automatically.

visibility.title: Visibility options
visibility.body: Public — anyone can find and view. Registered Only — only logged-in users. Link Only — only people with a direct link (not in search). Private — only you can see (useful for drafts).

minOfferPrice.title: Minimum offer price
minOfferPrice.body: The lowest offer amount you'll consider. Offers below this are automatically rejected. Leave empty to accept any offer amount.

details.title: Tips for a great listing
details.tip1: Use a clear, specific title with brand, size, and key features — this is the first thing buyers see.
details.tip2: Upload at least 3 photos: front, back, and any flaws. Natural lighting works best.
details.tip3: Describe the actual condition honestly — this builds trust and reduces returns.
details.tip4: Set the right condition level. "Good" means minor wear; "Like New" means no visible use.

pricing.title: Pricing tips
pricing.tip1: Research similar items before setting your price — overpriced items get fewer views.
pricing.tip2: Enabling offers often leads to faster sales. Many buyers prefer to negotiate.
pricing.tip3: Set a reasonable minimum offer to filter out lowball offers automatically.
pricing.tip4: Timed listings create urgency — consider setting an end date for high-demand items.

terms.title: Visibility & tags tips
terms.tip1: Add 3–5 relevant tags to help your item appear in search results.
terms.tip2: Keep items Public unless you have a reason to restrict access.
terms.tip3: Enable guest offers if you want to reach buyers who don't have an account.
terms.tip4: Offering shipping expands your buyer pool beyond your local area.
